article_title: Sonos Launches $299 Play Speaker and $189 Era 100 SL as First New Hardware Under CEO Tom Conrad Signals Post-App-Crisis Recovery
summary: Summary field contains text from an unrelated article (sodium-ion batteries). Article body is well-written but the summary must be corrected.

content_preview.title: Sonos Launches $299 Play Speaker and $189 Era 100 SL as First New Hardware Under CEO Tom Conrad Signals Post-App-Crisis Recovery
content_preview.summary: Peak Energy and RWE Americas have deployed the first sodium-ion battery system on the MISO grid in Wisconsin, marking a milestone for the cheaper, cobalt-free chemistry in the US.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Sonos unveiled two new speakers on March 10, 2026: the Sonos Play, a $299 portable Bluetooth and Wi-Fi speaker positioned between the Roam 2 and Move 2, and the Era 100 SL, a $189 mic-free variant of its entry-level home speaker. Both products are available for pre-order immediately and ship on March 31. The launch is the first new consumer hardware release under CEO Tom Conrad, who took the helm permanently in mid-2025 after the company's botched app redesign forced out his predece...

editor_notes.content_quality: Well-written consumer tech News article with good analysis of the Sonos app crisis context.
editor_notes.source_verification: 9to5Mac and TechRadar are legitimate sources. Bloomberg returned 403 (paywall/bot-blocking) but is a premier source.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: Article body appears well-researched. However, the SUMMARY field is completely wrong — it describes sodium-ion batteries on the MISO grid, which belongs to a different submission entirely.
editor_notes.originality: No existing Sonos coverage in the archive.
concerns: CRITICAL: Summary field reads 'Peak Energy and RWE Americas have deployed the first sodium-ion battery system on the MISO grid...' — this has nothing to do with Sonos speakers. Cross-contamination from parallel agent.
recommendations: Fix the summary to describe the Sonos Play and Era 100 SL launch
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Article body is publication-ready but wrong summary makes this unpublishable. REQUEST_CHANGES.
